title: BackroomsMC
body:
BackroomsMC – Server-Ready Modpack
==================================

**BackroomsMC** is a lightweight, plug-and-play modpack whose sole purpose is to drop you straight into the hosted Backrooms multiplayer server.  
Click **Play** on the title screen and the client auto-connects—no IPs to type, no configs to tweak.  
The moment you load in, the server immediately *noclips* you into **Level 0** of the Backrooms—no waiting lobby, no commands.

> Hold <kbd>Shift</kbd> while clicking **Play** if you’d rather open single-player instead.

---

What you get
------------

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| **Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage** by [SpacePotato](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage) | Generates Levels 0–2, the Poolrooms and Infinite Grass Field with immersive found-footage shaders. |
| **Wrapper/Launcher Mod** | Adds the custom main-menu, auto-connect logic and server-side trigger that instantly teleports every new arrival into the Backrooms. |
| **Bundled dependencies** | Veil, GeckoLib, Simple Voice Chat—everything the Backrooms mod needs, pre-configured. |

No extra content mods, no performance bloat: pure Backrooms experience plus voice chat.

---

Quick facts
-----------

* Minecraft 1.20.1 • Fabric (client ↔ dedicated server)  
* Joining the server automatically starts you in Backrooms Level 0.  
* Voice-chat settings reachable via the headset button on the main menu.

---

Credits
-------

* **Backrooms Found Footage** by [SpacePotato](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage) – the backbone of the experience.  
* Wrapper code and server hosting by our team.
